summary: Iteration 10 full-stack verification of the 5 requested changes (DELETE endpoints for departments/divisions/users + new GET /api/reports/range date-range report + range-report UI screen + trash buttons on GM management screens). Backend: 86/86 pytest cases pass (63 prior + 23 new in backend/tests/test_delete_and_range.py covering all delete permission branches + 404/400/403 edge cases + range endpoint shape, date validation, department_id filter for GM, and role scoping for non-GM). Frontend (390x844 mobile viewport, admin/admin123 login): (1) Home shows new 'تقرير بفترة' action button with testID action-range which routes to /range-report. (2) /range-report renders with input-from + input-to defaulting to 30-day window (2026-06-02 → 2026-07-02), GM sees 34 department chips including dept-all='كل الشركة' + 33 dept-{id} chips, non-GM (dm/divm/emp) do NOT see chips per code inspection. (3) Tapping generate-btn fetches /api/reports/range and renders 4 stat cards (28 total, 18 approved, 10 pending, 0 rejected in current DB) + 7 dept-row-* breakdown rows + activity list. export-range (PDF) and print-range buttons work in header. Invalid date range shows error toast ('تاريخ النهاية يجب أن يكون بعد تاريخ البداية'). (4) /departments shows 33 delete-dept-{id} trash icons + edit pencils. Creating a fresh empty dept via API then tapping its delete-dept-* button successfully removes it (browser confirm dialog auto-accepted, row disappears, count 34→33). (5) /divisions shows 21 delete-div-{id} buttons. (6) /users shows 15 delete-user-{id} buttons across 16 total users — admin's own row correctly has no delete button (self-deletion prevented at UI level). No React Native red screens, no console errors during flows.

react_native_issues.issue: Carried-over non-blocking warning from iter 8-9: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Not a regression. Reference: /app/frontend/app/login.tsx style sheets and others.

action_items: Optional (non-blocking): The self-deletion guard on DELETE /api/users/{id} returns 403 (not 400) when the caller is the general_manager attempting to delete self, because the 'general_manager role' check fires before the 'self' check (server.py:417-420). Both prevent deletion, so behavior is safe; only the status code differs from the spec. Consider reordering the two checks so the self-attempt returns 400 as originally specified.
Optional (non-blocking, carried over from iter 8-9): migrate shadow* → boxShadow across style sheets to silence RN 0.79+ web warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py:250-259 DELETE /departments/{id} — GM-only via require_roles, blocks with 400 if users OR divisions reference the dept (correct order: user check first, then division check), 404 if not found, 200 otherwise. No leaks.

backend/server.py:299-309 DELETE /divisions/{id} — GM+dept_manager, dept_manager scoped to own department (403 otherwise), blocks with 400 if users reference division. Correctly returns 404 for missing.

backend/server.py:412-431 DELETE /users/{id} — Protects GM role globally (403) and self (400 — but currently unreachable for GM self-attempt due to order; see action_items). Cascades permission through GM→dept_mgr, dept_mgr→(divm|emp in own dept), divm→emp in own div. Sound.

backend/server.py:619-671 GET /reports/range — Robust date parsing with try/except → 400 on bad format. end<=start returns 400. Uses [start_of_from_date, end_of_to_date+1day) window so single-day ranges (from==to) work. Applies _filter_by_scope() first, then adds department_id ONLY when caller is GM (correct — prevents non-GM callers from broadening scope). Uses server-side aggregation over cursor to build by_department; response shape matches spec exactly (count, approved, pending, rejected, by_department[], activities[], from_date, to_date, department_id).

frontend/app/range-report.tsx — Correct testIDs (input-from/input-to/generate-btn/export-range/print-range/dept-all/dept-{id}/dept-row-{name}). Note the review request mentions export-btn/print-btn but the actual (and consistent) testIDs are export-range/print-range — not a bug, just naming.

frontend/app/departments.tsx:160, divisions.tsx:184, users.tsx:169 — delete-*-{id} testIDs correctly interpolate row id. Web-side uses window.confirm(); RN uses Alert.alert with cancel/confirm handlers.
No hardcoded URLs in delete/range implementations — all use process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL.
MongoDB _id correctly excluded via {"_id": 0} projections everywhere including in new range endpoint (server.py:642).
seed_data_creation: test_delete_and_range.py creates a fresh TEST_del_dept_/TEST_del_div_/TEST_del_dm_/TEST_del_divm_/TEST_del_emp_ hierarchy per module. Some empty temp depts (TEST_o_/TEST_dwd_/TEST_empty_dept_) are cleaned up in-test; the main test hierarchy is intentionally kept for cross-suite reuse. UI flow additionally created + deleted TEST_ui_del_* dept. Consider nightly cleanup of TEST_-prefixed docs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 fully verified. New endpoints: DELETE /api/departments/{id} (GM only, 400 if children exist), DELETE /api/divisions/{id} (GM+dm, 400 if users exist), DELETE /api/users/{id} (permission-scoped, protects GM+self), GET /api/reports/range?from_date&to_date&department_id (role-scoped, dept filter GM-only). New screen /range-report. UI testIDs: action-range, range-report-screen, input-from, input-to, dept-all, dept-{id}, generate-btn, export-range, print-range, dept-row-{name}, delete-dept-{id}, delete-div-{id}, delete-user-{id}. Delete confirmation uses window.confirm on web + Alert.alert on native. Test creds unchanged: admin/admin123. NOTE: 23 new backend tests + 63 old tests all pass concurrently (86 total). Test data has accumulated many TEST_-prefixed items — safe to leave.
rca_of_issue: One minor spec deviation identified (self-deletion returns 403 instead of 400 for GM caller) — non-blocking; both codes correctly prevent the deletion. Fix would be reordering the two guard clauses in server.py delete_user.
